title: CobbleBob: A Pokémon Adventure
description: Welcome to Cobblebob: A Pokémon Adventure! This pack is focused on one thing and one thing only... filling out the Pokédex. For the adventurers, there are dungeons and backpacks. For the builders, there are many different building centered mods.
body:
# Welcome to CobbleBob: A Pokémon Adventure!
I have spent weeks trying to perfect this pack for those of you who want to adventure, build, and catch pokémon. It is not a very grind heavy pack, it is for those of you that want a calm and relaxed experience. The level caps are increased to 200 but do not fret, the multipliers for both experience and money are increased from 2-3x. The world contains dungeons and higher tiered armor for those of you that want to fight mobs and loot. The pack also includes a few different building mods that should satisfy you. I thank you for downloading and I hope you enjoy CobbleBob: A Pokémon Adventure.

### Contact Me!
If you have any comments, suggestions, or find bugs in the modpack, please contact me.
Discord: ryzemad
